understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile (+) without dying, within the turn/step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only), and after that move gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard spike (u/v) and loses immediately, or reaches the goal (+) and wins. CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate [x,y] to interact with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable blocks x) and does not move the player; UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
